nodes.name: Illadopsis
nodes.summary: Illadopsis（Illadopsis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联9种鸟类，如Brown illadopsis、Pale-breasted illadopsis、Tanzanian illadopsis等9种鸟类。

nodes.name: Scaly-breasted illadopsis
nodes.summary: Scaly-breasted illadopsis（Illadopsis albipectus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Scaly-breasted illadopsis。

nodes.name: Scaly-breasted illadopsis
nodes.summary: The scaly-breasted illadopsis (Illadopsis albipectus) is a species of bird in the family Pellorneidae. It is widespread throughout the Congo Basin, with a few isolated pockets in northern Angola, Uganda and South Sudan. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest, specifically in the understory and lower levels. It is sedentary. References
